title: JSX (JavaScript XML) Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of JSX syntax, rules, and its core purpose in React.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the best way to define a JSX element with a CSS class 'main'?
What happens when you use an expression in JSX (e.g., {5 + 5})?
options: It will be displayed as a string in the UI.
The JavaScript expression will be evaluated, and the result displayed.
It takes 5+5 and sets it as the ID.
It will cause a syntax error.

questions.question: Which of the following is a key rule when writing JSX?
options: Each element must have a unique ID.
All tags must be in uppercase.
JSX must always be wrapped in a single parent element or a Fragment.
You must use single quotes only.

questions.question: In JSX, what should you use instead of the 'for' attribute in a label tag?
What does JSX compile into under the hood?
